# Store Hours

Acme Shop's physical storefront is open Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and closed on public holidays. Two Source documents describe this policy in different wording; this page consolidates them into one canonical answer.

[Source: store_hours_a.md#weekday-hours]
[Source: store_hours_b.md#weekday-hours]
